adjudicator_mark.evidence: **Rebase the branch onto main, dropping the redundant weighted commits:** `git rebase --onto main feat/weighted-scorer feat/pairwise-metric`. This replays only `7b2e100` and `1bfecb6` (confirmed by `git log feat/weighted-scorer..feat/pairwise-metric`) onto `1971f08`. ... **Re-verify post-rebase:** `git log --oneline main..feat/pairwise-metric` should show exactly the two pairwise commits; `git diff main..feat/pairwise-metric` should be unchanged (the same clean two-file diff); the branch now contains the current trunk tip `1971f08`.

votes.evidence: `git fetch origin`; confirm local `main` == `origin/main` (`1971f08`) ... **Rebase the branch onto main, dropping the redundant weighted commits:** `git rebase --onto main feat/weighted-scorer feat/pairwise-metric`. This replays only `7b2e100` and `1bfecb6` ... `git log --oneline main..feat/pairwise-metric` should show exactly the two pairwise commits

disputes.rule: two-of-three majority: the two primary judges' marks plus the adjudicator's mark; because the primaries split one-to-one on a disputed mark, the majority equals the adjudicator's mark, and the mark stays in every denominator
